title: Escape to Danger
writer: Patrick Kirwan, Wolfgang Wilhelm, Jack Whittingham
actors: Eric Portman, Ann Dvorak, Karel Stepanek
plot: Joan Grahame (Ann Dvorak), an English teacher in Denmark, appears to be working for the Axis but is really a double-agent doing her duty for the Allies. The Nazis send her to England on a spying mission to learn the invasion plans...
